meta.title: NA Outdoor
meta.description: A fellowship of Narcotics Anonymous members in Norway who find strength, connection, and joy through nature. Two annual gatherings in Trysil — Ski & Recovery (winter) and Bike 2 Basic (summer).
meta.ogDescription: Two annual NA gatherings in Trysil, Norway. Ski & Recovery (winter) · Bike 2 Basic (summer).

home.about: NA Outdoor is a fellowship of members within Narcotics Anonymous Norway who find strength, connection, and joy through nature.
home.aboutTail: Made possible by the 7th Tradition — supported solely by voluntary contributions from our members.

readings.title: Readings.
readings.subtitle: Meeting formats and core NA literature, available in eight languages.
readings.speakerBody: The classic NA speaker meeting opening and closing script.
readings.jftBody: For Just for Today and Spiritual Principle a Day meetings.
